result:
Draft saved to `runtime/drafts/brightpath-fixed-bid-decline.md`. Their $18,000 is below the studio's $25,000 fixed-bid floor, so the reply declines directly but leaves room to revisit if their budget moves.

---

Hi Jordan,

Thank you for thinking of Okonkwo Studio. A product onboarding redesign is exactly the kind of work we do, and the late-summer timeline is workable in principle.

That said, I want to be upfront: our fixed-bid floor is $25,000. At $18,000 we would not be able to scope the engagement in a way that delivers the quality we hold ourselves to, so I do not think it would be a good fit at that budget.

If there is flexibility on the number, I would be glad to get on a call and talk through what a well-scoped project could look like. Otherwise, I am happy to point you toward studios whose floor may be closer to your range.

Either way, I wish you well with the project.

Best, Dana

---

Ready to send or adjust tone/offer.
